elements.text: Wallet Ledger Modes: Recording vs Authorizing
elements.originalText: Wallet Ledger Modes: Recording vs Authorizing

elements.text: Applied to our wallet engine: record external rails asynchronously, authorize user balance synchronously, and separate these phases clearly in mixed-mode flows.
elements.originalText: Applied to our wallet engine: record external rails asynchronously, authorize user balance synchronously, and separate these phases clearly in mixed-mode flows.

elements.text: Recording notes: delayed reflection of external movement; use effective_at for event time and account_version for consistent historical reads.

elements.text: Phase 1: Authorize user-side and reserve funds

elements.text:
Transaction intent
- transaction_id: tx_wd_2001
- type: withdrawal
- effective_at: 2026-03-11T09:00:00Z
- created_at: 2026-03-11T09:00:01Z
- amount: 100 USD
- status: pending
elements.originalText:
Transaction intent
- transaction_id: tx_wd_2001
- type: withdrawal
- effective_at: 2026-03-11T09:00:00Z
- created_at: 2026-03-11T09:00:01Z
- amount: 100 USD
- status: pending

elements.text:
Authorizing entry
- entry_id: e_wd_2001_user_p1
- transaction_id: tx_wd_2001
- account_id: user_wallet
- effective_at: 2026-03-11T09:00:00Z
- amount: 100 USD
- direction: debit
- status: pending
- balance_condition: available_balance >= 0
- pending_balance_amount: -100 USD

Authorizing entry

elements.text:
Recording leg intent
- planned_entry_id: e_wd_2001_ips_final
- transaction_id: tx_wd_2001
- account_id: ips_settlement_holding
- effective_at: 2026-03-11T09:00:00Z
- amount: 100 USD
- direction: credit
- waits for IPS outcome before materialization

elements.text: Phase 1 result: user funds are reserved/locked immediately, but IPS-side recorded movement is still only an intent.
elements.originalText: Phase 1 result: user funds are reserved/locked immediately, but IPS-side recorded movement is still only an intent.

elements.text:
User balance after phase 1
- posted unchanged
- pending/available reflect 100 USD reserved
elements.originalText:
User balance after phase 1
- posted unchanged

elements.text: Phase 2: External IPS event arrives and finalizes the outcome
elements.originalText: Phase 2: External IPS event arrives and finalizes the outcome

elements.text:
IPS event
confirm or fail?
elements.originalText:
IPS event
confirm or fail?

elements.text:
On confirm
- discard pending user reserve entry
- create posted user entry and posted IPS entry
- both posted entries inherit transaction effective_at
- recording-side entry becomes visible only now
elements.originalText:
On confirm
- discard pending user reserve entry
- create posted user entry and posted IPS entry
- both posted entries inherit transaction effective_at
- recording-side entry becomes visible only now

elements.text:
On fail / cancel
- discard pending user reserve entry
- do not materialize posted IPS entry
- release reserved funds
- archive or void transaction intent
elements.originalText:
On fail / cancel
- discard pending user reserve entry
- do not materialize posted IPS entry
- release reserved funds
- archive or void transaction intent

elements.text: Key rule: the recording-side posted entry appears only after authorization has succeeded and the external outcome is known.
elements.originalText: Key rule: the recording-side posted entry appears only after authorization has succeeded and the external outcome is known.
